node.description:
Sylphiette is [Rudeus](https://anilist.co/character/88348/Rudeus-Greyrat)' childhood friend who is part human, elf, and beast race.

~!Following the teleportation incident, during which her hair turned white from mana exhaustion, she became Princess Ariel's personal bodyguard under the alias Fitz.!~

~!She is Rudeus' first wife and gives birth to their daughter Lucy and son Sieghardt. She is one of the three goddesses Rudeus worships in his religion. A cloth stained with her virgin blood that serves as a relic for the Goddess of Love is enshrined in the basement.!~

__Height:__ 175 cm (5'9")

Rudeus is a tall, well-built, and cool-looking man. However, before his reincarnation, he was originally an overweight 34-year-old Japanese NEET who became a recluse following his high-school persecution. Because of his former life, he is careful not to get carried away and become arrogant. As a result, he is extremely self-aware and humble because he does not want to revert to his old self. He is a kind person, helping his friends and protecting his family whenever needed. Due to being capable in many fields, people have high expectations of him. His current body possesses a high affinity for magic even as a child. Rudeus is very polite to others, often making them uncomfortable.

Rudeus is one of the few people capable of using a voiceless incantation, and even rarer as a person who can use voiceless incantation with melded magics. He cannot use voiceless incantation for healing magic due to his lack of understanding in regards to how mana is manipulated to heal. A normal Magician takes at least five seconds for a simple spell, while for higher-level spells it's thirty to sixty seconds. Rudeus can do it almost instantly no matter what difficulty of the spell, with the exception of healing magic.

Eris Boreas Greyrat is a noble girl and distant relative of [Rudeus](https://anilist.co/character/88348/Rudeus-Greyrat). She is a tsundere character with a short temper but has potential in the Sword-God style.

Roxy Migurdia is a talented mage from the Migurd race, and a former magic tutor. Because she can't use telepathy, she left her village due to feeling isolated from her peers. Unable to make a stable living as an adventurer, she became a travelling tutor and eventually becomes [Rudeus](https://anilist.co/character/88348/Rudeus-Greyrat)' teacher.

~!She is Rudeus' second wife and gives birth to their daughter Lara & Lily. She is one of the three goddesses Rudeus worships in his religion. Her panties that serves as a relic for the Goddess of Wisdom is enshrined in the basement.!~

Ruijerd Superdia is the former leader of the Superd's Warrior group whom once served under Laplace with unwavering loyalty. He was accompanying [Rudeus](https://anilist.co/character/88348/Rudeus-Greyrat) and [Eris](https://anilist.co/character/88349/Eris-Boreas-Greyrat).

~!Laplace betrayed his group by giving them each a devil spear which made them ecstatic from killing, even their own family. After giving his son a fatal wound, his son managed to destroy the devil spear and Ruijerd finally wakes up from the brainwash. He considered committing suicide but decided not to and everyone of that warrior group swore revenged on Laplace.

He finally got his revenge after several years of hiding. He interfered in the battle between Laplace and the three heroes. But even if Laplace was defeated, there was no way to change the things that had already transpired.

After exacting his revenge, he now has a goal of removing the infamy the Superd race has.!~

__Light Novel Volume 9 spoiler__

~! Nanahoshi Shizuka is a Japanese girl that was saved by [Rudeus](https://anilist.co/character/88348/Rudeus-Greyrat) in his past life, but instead of reincarnating like Rudeus, she was teleported to Asura Kingdom and was saved by [Orsted](https://anilist.co/character/187382/Orsted). !~
**Hilda Boreas Greyrat** is the mother of Eris and the wife of Philip.

Kishirika Kishirisu is The Great Empress of the Demon Realm. She is the demon empress known for her demon eyes' powers and the ability to bestow others with demon eyes. She is engaged to [Badigadi](https://anilist.co/character/262620/Badigadi), the demon lord of immortality.

__Light Novel Volume 4 Spoiler__
~!Kishirika Kishirisu is the person that is responsible for giving [Rudeus](https://anilist.co/character/88348/Rudeus-Greyrat) his demon eye, among other favors!~

An arrogant adventurer Rudeus meets on the Demon Continent.

~!He gets killed in action in the middle of a quest.!~
Elinalise is a former member of Paul's party. She has an erotic nature due to her curse. She is a warrior that is good at managing monster aggro but isn't a great fighter.

__Ghislaine Dedoldia__ is the daughter of Gustav the former Doldia village chief, and the mentor of [Eris](https://anilist.co/character/88349/Eris-Boreas-Greyrat) and she is also the student of [Rudeus Greyrat](https://anilist.co/character/88348/Rudeus-Greyrat) in magic and other subjects. She is one of the few people who have become a Sword King.
Almanfi is one of eleven servants of Perugius.
A young adventurer Rudeus encounters on the Demon Continent, and the leader of the Tokurabu Toughs. He aspires to make his party famous.
A dwarf that was member of the Party "Fang of the Black Wolf", with Elinalise and Roxy. He is slow and not agile, so he wears sturdy armor, wields an axe, and uses magic against enemies.

Aisha Greyrat is the daughter of [Lilia](https://anilist.co/character/179854/Lilia) and [Paul Greyrat](https://anilist.co/character/88347/Paul-Greyrat) and is the younger half-sister of [Rudeus Greyrat](https://anilist.co/character/88348/Rudeus-Greyrat) and [Norn Greyrat](https://anilist.co/character/145458/Norn-Greyrat).
**Edna Rayrune** is a middle-aged woman who is Eris' tutor in etiquette.
Perugius Dola is one of the heroes who banished Demon God Laplace.
An arrogant adventurer Rudeus meets on the Demon Continent.

Paul Greyrat is the father of [Rudeus Greyrat](https://anilist.co/character/88348/Rudeus-Greyrat), Norn Greyrat and Aisha Greyrat. He is both a talented man that became advanced in all three sword arts at a young age and a lustful man that attracts and sleeps with many women before [Zenith](https://anilist.co/character/179855/Zenith-Greyrat) chained him down.

Norn Greyrat is the daughter of [Zenith Greyrat](https://anilist.co/character/179855/Zenith-Greyrat) and [Paul Greyrat](https://anilist.co/character/88347/Paul-Greyrat) and is the younger sister of [Rudeus Greyrat](https://anilist.co/character/88348) and older half-sister of [Aisha Greyrat](https://anilist.co/character/145459/Aisha-Greyrat).

Hitogami is the Man God, having the power to see into the future, and the sworn enemy of [Orsted](https://anilist.co/character/187382). He has a blank white face coupled with a grin that eludes memory, which gives off the feeling that his face is covered in a mosaic. He helps [Rudeus](https://anilist.co/character/88348/Rudeus-Greyrat) throughout key points in his journey.

~!Hitogami later becomes the overarching antagonist of the series following the revelation that he actually sought to prevent the birth of Rudeus' children, who are prophesied to kill him one day.!~

~!Hitogami's exact origins are unknown, however it is known that after the Creator God's death, unbeknownst to anyone, he was born within the Void World. At some point in the distant past, the being who would come to be known as Hitogami killed or otherwise usurped the original Man God and took his form. He then began manipulating the Dragon God and his five Dragon Generals into destroying the other four worlds and then proceeded to help the survivors of those ruined world to flee into the human world.!~
An adventurer Rudeus encounters on the Demon Continent and a member of Kurt's party.
One of the kids from Buena Village who bullied [Sylphiette](https://anilist.co/character/88346).
